prompt_text:
### Demographics: 62-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 12 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Hemodialysis)
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Major Depressive Disorder
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Hemodialysis); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Current smoker (10 cigarettes/day for 20 years; ~10 pack-years); Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Linagliptin 5mg once daily; Olanzapine (10 mg nightly), Sertraline (50 mg daily), Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 65.5 kg; Height 158.4 cm; BMI 26.1 kg/m²; Blood pressure 131/83 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.8%; 9 months ago 9.0%; 6 months ago 8.9%; 3 months ago 8.4%; current 8.7%), FPG (12 months ago 198mg/dL; 9 months ago 221mg/dL; 6 months ago 248mg/dL; 3 months ago 196mg/dL; current 228mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 66.7kg; 9 months ago 67.3kg; 6 months ago 65.3kg; 3 months ago 67.3kg; current 65.5kg), Height (12 months ago 158.4cm; 9 months ago 158.4cm; 6 months ago 158.4cm; 3 months ago 158.4cm; current 158.4cm), BMI (12 months ago 27.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 27.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 27.0kg/m²; current 26.1kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 130mmHg; 9 months ago 136mmHg; 6 months ago 132mmHg; 3 months ago 130mmHg; current 131mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 85mmHg; 9 months ago 84mmHg; 6 months ago 81mmHg; 3 months ago 82mmHg; current 83mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 20U/L; 9 months ago 13U/L; 6 months ago 19U/L; 3 months ago 19U/L; current 16U/L), AST (12 months ago 15U/L; 9 months ago 22U/L; 6 months ago 23U/L; 3 months ago 21U/L; current 19U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.9mg/dL; current 0.9mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 11mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 13mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 8.0mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 6.4mL/min/1.73m²; current 7mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 708mg/g; 9 months ago 754mg/g; 6 months ago 842mg/g; 3 months ago 657mg/g; current 849mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 97mg/dL; 9 months ago 95mg/dL; 6 months ago 95mg/dL; 3 months ago 101mg/dL; current 98mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 38mg/dL; 9 months ago 36mg/dL; 6 months ago 36mg/dL; 3 months ago 38mg/dL; current 37mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 137mg/dL; 9 months ago 139mg/dL; 6 months ago 124mg/dL; 3 months ago 124mg/dL; current 131mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 13.0g/dL; 6 months ago 13.0g/dL; 3 months ago 12.2g/dL; current 12.3g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
